    • Package Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE

      • Class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState

        class CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState extends State implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • batteries
            int batteries
          • declaredPower
            double declaredPower
            The declared power of the player, which is used to determine the outcome of the game.
          • worst
            double worst
            The worst declared power among the players, used to determine the player with the lowest power.

      • Class Controller.CombatZone.Level_ONE.CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState

        class CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState extends State implements Serializable

            double declaredPower
          • worst
            double worst
            The worst declared power among the players, used to determine the player with the lowest power.

      • Class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.BuildingState

        class BuildingState extends State implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • finishedPlayers
            Map<Integer,Player> finishedPlayers
            Map of players who have finished assembly with their starting position

            Map<Integer,List<Integer>> validCoordinates

        class FixShipState extends State implements Serializable

    • Package Networking.RMI

      • Class Networking.RMI.DispatcherImpl

        class DispatcherImpl extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • server
            Server server
            The server instance that this dispatcher will connect to.

      • Class Networking.RMI.RMIMessageQueue

        class RMIMessageQueue extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • queue
            Queue<Message> queue
            The queue that holds the messages. This is a thread-safe queue that allows for synchronized access to enqueue and dequeue operations.

    • Package View.Client.Actions

      • Class View.Client.Actions.ConnectAction

        class ConnectAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • hostname
            String hostname
            The hostname(IP address) of the server to connect to.
          • port
            Integer port
            The port number of the server to connect to.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.CreateGameAction

        class CreateGameAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • matchLevel
            MatchLevel matchLevel
            The match level for the game to be created.

        class ExceptionAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • e
            Exception e
            The exception to be logged.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.JoinAction

        class JoinAction extends Object implements Serializable

            int gameId
            The ID of the game that the player wants to join.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.JoinSuccessAction

        class JoinSuccessAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • game
            Game game
            The game that the player has successfully joined.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.LoginAction

        class LoginAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • username
            String username
            The username of the user attempting to log in.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.LoginFailedAction

        class LoginFailedAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • username
            String username
            The username that was attempted to be logged in.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.LoginSuccessAction

        class LoginSuccessAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • username
            String username
            The username of the user who has successfully logged in.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.UpdateGameAction

        class UpdateGameAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • game
            Game game
            The game instance to update the client state with.

      • Class View.Client.Actions.UpdateListAction

        class UpdateListAction extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • newList
            Integer[] newList
            The new list of game IDs to update in the client state. This array contains the IDs of the games that are currently available.
